summary: Iteration 90 - Cooperative Network Admin Dashboard Tab Testing Complete. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend CooperativeNetworkTab component fully functional with all required features: KPI cards, network tree, top sponsors, regional distribution, growth timeline, recent affiliations, and searchable/filterable cooperatives list.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: GET /api/cooperative-referral/admin/network-full returns 200 for admin users

PASS: Response includes stats (total_cooperatives, affiliated_cooperatives, orphan_cooperatives, active_sponsors, affiliation_rate, total_members_in_network, cooperatives_with_code, code_coverage_rate)
PASS: Response includes nodes array with cooperative details (id, coop_name, referral_code, region, is_sponsor, is_affiliated)
PASS: Response includes edges array for sponsor-affiliate relationships
PASS: Response includes top_sponsors array
PASS: Response includes recent_affiliations array
PASS: Response includes region_distribution array
PASS: Response includes growth_timeline array
PASS: Non-admin users get 403 on GET /api/cooperative-referral/admin/network-full
PASS: Non-admin users get 403 on POST /api/cooperative-referral/admin/generate-code/{coop_id}
PASS: Non-admin users get 403 on DELETE /api/cooperative-referral/admin/remove-affiliation/{coop_id}
PASS: Invalid coop_id returns 404 on generate-code and remove-affiliation endpoints
PASS: Frontend SuperAdminDashboard has 'Réseau Coopératives' tab (data-testid='coop-network-tab-trigger')
PASS: Frontend CooperativeNetworkTab shows KPI cards (Total Coopératives, Coopératives Affiliées, Parrains Actifs, Membres du Réseau)
PASS: Frontend CooperativeNetworkTab shows network tree with sponsor-affiliate relationships
PASS: Frontend CooperativeNetworkTab shows Top Parrains section
PASS: Frontend CooperativeNetworkTab shows Répartition Régionale chart
PASS: Frontend CooperativeNetworkTab shows Croissance du Réseau timeline
PASS: Frontend CooperativeNetworkTab shows Affiliations Récentes section
PASS: Frontend CooperativeNetworkTab shows searchable/filterable list of cooperatives (data-testid='coop-network-search')
PASS: Frontend filter buttons work (Toutes, Parrains, Affiliées, Isolées)
PASS: Frontend CooperativeReferralPage.jsx share message includes application URL via window.location.origin
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 90 verified the new Cooperative Network Admin Dashboard tab. The tab is accessible at /admin/analytics under 'Réseau Coopératives'. Backend endpoint /api/cooperative-referral/admin/network-full returns comprehensive network data. Admin endpoints for generate-code and remove-affiliation are protected (403 for non-admin). Frontend displays all required components: KPI cards, network tree visualization, top sponsors, regional distribution, growth timeline, recent affiliations, and full cooperatives list with search/filter functionality.

GET /api/cooperative-referral/admin/netw.returns: stats, nodes, edges, top_sponsors, recent_affiliations, region_distribution, growth_timeline

SuperAdminDashboard.tab_integration: WORKING - 'Réseau Coopératives' tab visible and clickable

CooperativeNetworkTab.kpi_cards: WORKING - Total Coopératives, Coopératives Affiliées, Parrains Actifs, Membres du Réseau
CooperativeNetworkTab.network_tree: WORKING - Shows sponsor-affiliate relationships with visual hierarchy
CooperativeNetworkTab.top_sponsors: WORKING - Ranked list with affiliate counts
CooperativeNetworkTab.region_distribution: WORKING - Bar chart showing cooperatives per region
CooperativeNetworkTab.recent_affiliations: WORKING - Shows recent affiliations with dates
CooperativeNetworkTab.cooperatives_list: WORKING - Full list with search and filter (Toutes, Parrains, Affiliées, Isolées)
CooperativeNetworkTab.data_testid: coop-network-tab, coop-network-search, filter-all, filter-sponsors, filter-affiliated, filter-orphan
